posts.title: Grey Structure Construction Lahore — Mukammal Rahnumai
posts.summary: Grey structure kya hota hai, iske kya kya kaam hote hain aur Lahore mein iska kharcha kitna aata hai — sab kuch detail mein.
posts.body:
Grey Structure Kya Hota Hai?

Grey structure kisi bhi ghar ya building ki bunyadi dhancha (skeleton) hoti hai. Isme woh tamam kaam shamil hote hain jo plaster aur finishing se pehle kiye jate hain. Yeh structure hi pori building ka bojh uthata hai.

Grey Structure ke Kaam

  • Excavation aur Foundation: Zameen ki khudai aur bunyad banana — yeh sabse pehla aur zaroori qadam hai. Mazboot bunyad hi mazboot ghar ki zamin hoti hai.
  • RCC Structure aur Columns: Reinforced Cement Concrete ke columns aur beams jo poori building ko support dete hain.
  • Brick Masonry aur Walls: Eetton ki chinate aur dewarein banana — andar aur bahar ki tamam deewarein.
  • Roof Slab aur Stairs: Chhat ki dhalai (casting) aur seedhiyan banana — yeh bilkul level aur mazboot honi chahiye.
  • Floor Concrete: Har manzil ka farsh — jo baad mein tiles ya marble ke neeche aata hai.
  • Electrical Conduits: Deewaron ke andar bijli ki taarein (wiring) dalne ke liye pipes lagana.
  • Plumbing Conduits: Paani ki pipes aur drainage ka system — grey structure mein hi karna zaroori hai.

Grey Structure Steel (Reinforcement)

Steel rods (saria) concrete ke andar daali jati hain jo structure ko tensile strength deti hain. Achi quality ki steel aur sahi size ka istemaal zaroori hai. Mhbuilder Lahore mein hum sirf approved grade steel use karte hain.

Lahore mein Grey Structure Ki Takmeel Ka Waqt

Ek normal 5 marla ghar ka grey structure 3 se 4 mahine mein mukammal ho jata hai agar kaam bina ruke chalta rahe.

Grey Structure Ki Lambi Umar Ke Liye Zaroori Baatein

  • Curing (paani dena) concrete ke baad kam az kam 21 din karein
  • Mitti aur sand ka ratio bilkul sahi rakhein
  • Column size drawing plan ke mutabiq rakhen
  • Saria (steel) ko rust se bachayein

Humse Rabta Karein

Mhbuilder Lahore 25+ saalon se DHA Lahore aur aas paas ke ilaaqon mein grey structure construction ki khidmat de raha hai. Free site visit aur estimate ke liye aaj hi call ya WhatsApp karein.
